column5: I’m sick of sorting through concerts, series, and other non-movies. Anything with more than 1,000 views on Letterboxd that’s longer than 40 minutes, excluding documentaries. Exceptions: I'm including films that are just shy of 40 minutes, as well as Docufiction and some Hybrid Documentaries. Minimums for earlier years are different: 1910s - 300 1920s - 400 1930s - 700 1940s - 700 Sorted by Average Rating. Let me know if I'm missing something, or if there's something that shouldn't be on here (stage show, miniseries, TV show, etc...). Updates on Saturdays.
